alpine_config_rejection.contract: Config.load() raises ConfigValidationError with message containing 'Alpine Linux is no longer supported' for `vm.distro: alpine`

bare_role_names.contract: provisioner._get_base_roles returns role names without -alpine/-ubuntu suffix; e.g. 'common', 'python', 'docker'

config_no_vm_distro.contract: Config dataclass has no `vm_distro` attribute; Config.save emits no `distro` key under `vm`

stories.name: block-alpine-configs
stories.title: Block Alpine configs and surface migration message
stories.description: Introduce a hard error in Config.load() when vm.distro: alpine is encountered, emitting the FR5 multi-line migration message before any VM operation occurs. Add the migration guide doc and a unit test for the rejection path. All other Alpine code remains in place — this story establishes the single detection point (NFR2) that makes subsequent removals safe.
scope_in: src/clauded/config.py — replace _validate_distro() raise with the FR5 multi-line ConfigValidationError message when distro == 'alpine'
docs/migration-from-alpine.md — new file; AI-agent-readable migration steps referenced from the FR5 error message
tests/test_config.py — add unit test asserting ConfigValidationError is raised with the expected message fragment
CHANGELOG.md — [Unreleased] entry noting the Alpine config rejection guardrail
Omit version placeholder: do NOT include 'vX.Y.0' in the error message; keep the message version-agnostic
scope_out: Removing any other Alpine code (roles, distro.py, --distro flag, wizard step) — those are Stories 02-05
Changing Config.vm_distro field or schema — that is Story 03
Updating documentation beyond migration-from-alpine.md — that is Story 06
stories.observable_change: Running clauded against a .clauded.yaml with distro: alpine now exits with the actionable migration error. All Ubuntu workflows are unaffected.

stories.name: remove-distro-flag-and-wizard-step
stories.title: Remove the --distro flag and wizard distro-selection step
stories.description: Delete the --distro Click option from cli.py, _handle_distro_change(), and the distro_override parameter and _select_distro() function from wizard.py. Also remove the distro_override and _select_distro call sites in detect/wizard_integration.py (not enumerated in spec FRs but discovered via exploration). Delete or trim the corresponding test files.
scope_in: src/clauded/cli.py — remove --distro Click option (~line 712), _handle_distro_change (~line 531), distro_override pass-through (~lines 917, 921), SUPPORTED_DISTROS lazy import
src/clauded/wizard.py — remove _select_distro (~line 116), distro_override parameter on run() (~line 154), answers['distro'] assignment (~line 167), lazy distro imports
src/clauded/detect/wizard_integration.py — remove distro_override param (~line 30), _select_distro call (~line 103), vm_distro pass-through (~lines 488, 860)
tests/test_cli_distro.py — delete
tests/test_wizard_distro.py — delete
tests/test_distro_change.py — delete
tests/test_detect_integration.py — strip distro_override and vm_distro references
tests/test_wizard.py — strip distro_override pass-through
CHANGELOG.md — [Unreleased] entry noting --distro flag and wizard distro step removal
scope_out: Removing vm_distro from Config dataclass or YAML schema — that is Story 03
Removing distro.py or DistroProvider — that is Story 05
Removing Alpine Ansible roles — that is Story 04
stories.observable_change: The wizard opens at the Python version question with no prior distro prompt. clauded --distro ubuntu exits with Click's 'no such option' error.

stories.name: drop-vm-distro-from-schema
stories.title: Drop vm.distro from the Config schema and dataclass
stories.description: Remove the vm_distro attribute from the Config dataclass. Config.load() reads and discards any distro field for ubuntu (emitting an INFO log line per NFR4) and rejects alpine via the Story 01 guard. Config.save() no longer emits a distro key. Update provisioner.py to drop the vm_distro playbook variable. Also clean up the detect/wizard_integration.py vm_distro pass-through (lines 488, 860) that remain after Story 02.
scope_in: src/clauded/config.py — remove vm_distro field from Config dataclass, remove _validate_distro(), read and silently discard distro: ubuntu with INFO log, ensure Config.save() emits no distro key
src/clauded/provisioner.py — remove vm_distro Ansible variable (~line 381)
src/clauded/detect/wizard_integration.py — remove remaining vm_distro pass-through (~lines 488, 860) if not already addressed in Story 02
tests/test_config_distro.py — delete or fold alpine-rejection test into test_config.py
tests/test_config.py — update any fixture that passes vm_distro kwarg; add/verify the alpine-rejection test (AC1 unit coverage)
tests/test_version_check.py — strip vm_distro='alpine' from Config fixtures (~18 references)
tests/test_database.py — strip vm_distro='alpine' from fixtures
CHANGELOG.md — [Unreleased] entry noting vm.distro config field removal
scope_out: Removing --distro CLI flag or wizard distro step — that is Story 02
Removing Alpine roles or renaming ubuntu roles — that is Story 04
Removing distro.py module — that is Story 05
stories.observable_change: New .clauded.yaml files written by Config.save() contain no distro field. Loading an old ubuntu config succeeds with an INFO log; no user action required.

stories.name: remove-alpine-roles-and-rename-ubuntu
stories.title: Remove *-alpine roles, delete stale bare dirs, and rename *-ubuntu to bare names
stories.description: Execute the role directory transition: delete all 24 *-alpine directories, delete all 19 stale bare-name role directories (including playwright which is Alpine-only despite its bare name), and rename all 25 *-ubuntu directories to bare names (including opencode-ubuntu -> opencode). Remove the opencode-alpine guard from provisioner.py. Strip _apply_distro_suffix(), _ROLES_WITH_VARIANTS, and suffix application from provisioner.py so it emits bare role names.
scope_in: src/clauded/roles/*-alpine/ — git rm -r all 24 directories

src/clauded/roles/{aws_cli,c,dart,docker,gh,go,gradle,java,kotlin,maven,mongodb,mysql,playwright,poetry,postgresql,redis,rust,sqlite,uv}/ — git rm -r all 19 stale bare dirs (playwright explicitly included even though not in _ROLES_WITH_VARIANTS)
src/clauded/roles/*-ubuntu/ — git mv all 25 to bare names; opencode-ubuntu -> opencode

src/clauded/provisioner.py — remove _ROLES_WITH_VARIANTS frozenset (~line 23), _apply_distro_suffix (~line 139), opencode-alpine guard (~lines 179-185), distro string in role-not-found error message (~line 195)
tests/test_provisioner.py — remove TestApplyDistroSuffix class, opencode-alpine tests, update role-name assertions to bare names
CHANGELOG.md — [Unreleased] entry noting *-alpine role removal and -ubuntu suffix drop
scope_out: Removing distro.py or DistroProvider abstraction — that is Story 05
stories.observable_change: Provisioning logs emit 'Roles: common, python, docker, ...' with bare names. Provisioning completes end-to-end for Ubuntu projects.

stories.name: remove-distro-provider-and-alpine-assets
stories.title: Remove DistroProvider abstraction and remaining Alpine assets
stories.description: Delete distro.py entirely (ADR-001). Remove get_alpine_image() from downloads.py, simplify get_cloud_image() to no-arg Ubuntu-only, and drop the alpine_image block from downloads.yml. Remove get_vm_distro() and Alpine comments from lima.py. Remove the linux-arm64-musl branch from cli.py. Remove all remaining distro imports across modules.
scope_in: src/clauded/distro.py — delete entirely
src/clauded/downloads.py — remove get_alpine_image() (~line 64), remove alpine_image key from get_ansible_download_vars() (~line 128), simplify get_cloud_image() to no-arg Ubuntu-only
src/clauded/downloads.yml — remove alpine_image block (~lines 14-17)

src/clauded/lima.py — remove get_vm_distro() SSH method (~line 360), remove lazy distro import and _get_image_config distro branch (~lines 425-437; replace with direct Ubuntu URL lookup), remove Alpine comments at lines 229 and 501
src/clauded/cli.py — remove linux-arm64-musl branch (~line 254); replace with unconditional linux-arm64
src/clauded/provisioner.py — remove remaining `from .distro import ...` import
tests/test_distro.py — delete
tests/test_downloads_distro.py — delete
tests/test_downloads.py — strip alpine-specific cases
tests/test_lima.py — strip get_vm_distro and _get_image_config(distro='alpine') tests
CHANGELOG.md — [Unreleased] entry noting DistroProvider abstraction removal
stories.observable_change: No code path references 'alpine' in src/ beyond the FR5 error message in config.py. Ubuntu users see identical behavior.

stories.name: documentation-spec-changelog
stories.title: Documentation, spec, and CHANGELOG cleanup
stories.description: Delete the two Alpine-only doc files, update all docs that contain live Alpine references, update README.md and user-stories.md, update specs/spec.md to reflect Ubuntu-only reality, and add the final NFR5 CHANGELOG entries. Run the NFR3 grep check and confirm it passes (with linguist/languages.yml filtered out if needed).
scope_in: docs/alpine-architecture.md — delete
docs/claude-code-alpine-troubleshooting.md — delete
docs/architecture.md — remove Alpine paragraphs and dual-distro discussion
docs/configuration.md — remove Alpine examples and --distro flag documentation
docs/supply-chain-security.md — remove Alpine repository signing notes
docs/testing-infrastructure.md — remove dual-distro test matrix references
README.md — remove Alpine bullets, --distro examples, change-distro guidance, wizard distro example
user-stories.md — strike Alpine personas and lines
specs/spec.md — update base OS to Ubuntu 24.04 LTS, remove dual-distro narrative, update role table

Any source code changes — all code changes complete by Story 05

stories.name: end-to-end-validation-and-release
stories.title: End-to-end validation and release
stories.description: Run full Ubuntu provisioning end-to-end for representative role combinations (Python+Node, Java+PostgreSQL, Rust+Docker). Verify lint, typecheck, and pytest coverage all pass. Confirm the NFR3 grep check is clean. Tag and publish the release.
scope_in: Full Ubuntu provisioning run: Python+Node project, Java+PostgreSQL project, Rust+Docker project
uv run pytest tests/ --cov=clauded --cov-report=term-missing --cov-fail-under=80 — must pass
make lint, make typecheck — must pass with no new errors
NFR3 grep check: grep -ri 'alpine' src/ tests/ docs/ specs/ — verify only allowed hits remain
Release tag (version determined per CHANGELOG entries from Stories 01-06)
scope_out: Any code or documentation changes not driven by validation failures
stories.observable_change: A user-installable release where Ubuntu 24.04 LTS is the sole supported guest OS, with all tooling gates green.
